blocker: Real-haiku --real sweep blocked by Anthropic billing (HTTP 400 'credit balance too low'); offline deterministic sweep completed instead.
one_line: Lambda-sweep driver (no core edits, evaluate= override; fidelity-tested == train_score @0.003) run offline over 6 lambdas: penalty is a no-op tie-breaker for lambda<=0.01, under-fits at 0.03 (rules 3->2, held-out acc 0.744->0.718), and COLLAPSES the harness to empty (all 13 held-out should-blocks become false-allows) at lambda>=0.08; 6/6 driver + 9/9 core tests pass.
